name: @the-new-fuse/electron-desktop
description: The New Fuse - Hybrid Desktop Automation System
author: Daniel Goldberg

scripts.dev: pnpm run build:main && concurrently "pnpm run sync:watch" "pnpm run dev:vite" "node ../browser-hub/serve-hub.js" "pnpm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:${PORT:-5174} && pnpm dlx electron dist/main/main.js
scripts.build:main: esbuild src/main/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --outfile=dist/main/main.js --external:electron && esbuild src/main/HybridBackend.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --outfile=dist/main/HybridBackend.js --external:electron && esbuild src/main/PlaywrightService.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --outfile=dist/main/PlaywrightService.js --external:electron && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json
scripts.build: vite build && pnpm run build:main && node ./scripts/copy-browser-hub.js --once
scripts.build:with-theia: cd ../theia-ide && pnpm run build && cd ../electron-desktop && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && node ./scripts/copy-browser-hub.js --once
